headline: Jesse Derry
body: Jesse Derry has joined Sporting Lisbon, one of Portugal’s most successful clubs, on loan for the duration of the 2026/27 season. Everyone at Chelsea wishes Jesse well for the season ahead and we look forward to monitoring and supporting his development. Link NEWS 📃 chelseafc.com
raw_text:
Jesse Derry has joined Sporting Lisbon, one of Portugal’s most successful clubs, on loan for the duration of the 2026/27 season. 

Everyone at Chelsea wishes Jesse well for the season ahead and we look forward to monitoring and supporting his development.

Link



NEWS 📃
chelseafc.com
